name: bindery-mcp
description: Book authoring tools for Claude Desktop: chapter navigation, full-text search, typography formatting, and export. Works with any Bindery markdown book project.

books.title: Books
books.description: Semicolon-separated Name=path pairs pointing to your book projects. Example: MyBook=C:\Users\Me\MyBook;MyNovel=D:\Writing\MyNovel

ollama_url.title: Ollama URL (optional)
ollama_url.description: If you run Ollama locally, set this to enable semantic reranking (e.g. http://localhost:11434). Leave empty to use fast lexical-only search, which works well for most books.

tools.name: list_books
tools.description: List all books configured in the MCP server. Call this first to discover available book names.

tools.name: identify_book
tools.description: Identify which book matches a working directory. Pass your cwd and the server matches by folder name or .bindery/settings.json.

tools.name: health
tools.description: Check server status: active book, settings, search index, and embedding backend.

tools.name: init_workspace
tools.description: Create or update .bindery/settings.json and translations.json. All arguments optional — smart defaults used if omitted. Detects language folders automatically. Safe to run on an existing workspace.

tools.name: setup_ai_files
tools.description: Generate AI assistant instruction files (CLAUDE.md, copilot-instructions.md, .cursor/rules, AGENTS.md) and Claude skill templates from settings. Run init_workspace first. Skips existing files unless overwrite: true.

tools.name: index_build
tools.description: Build or rebuild the full-text search index for a book. Run once after cloning, then as needed.

tools.name: index_status
tools.description: Show current index metadata: chunk count and build time.

tools.name: retrieve_context
tools.description: Find the most relevant passages for a query. Use for 'where did X happen' or 'what did character Y say about Z'.

tools.name: search
tools.description: Full-text BM25 search across all story and notes files. Returns ranked snippets with file paths and line numbers.

tools.name: get_text
tools.description: Read a source file by relative path, optionally restricted to a line range.

tools.name: get_chapter
tools.description: Fetch the full content of a chapter by number and language code (e.g. EN or NL).

tools.name: get_overview
tools.description: List the chapter structure (acts, chapters, titles) for one or all languages.

tools.name: get_notes
tools.description: Read from Notes/ and Details_*.md, optionally filtered by category or character name.

tools.name: format
tools.description: Apply typography formatting (curly quotes, em-dashes, ellipses) to a file or folder.

tools.name: get_review_text
tools.description: Structured git diff of uncommitted changes. Filter by language (EN, NL, ALL). Set autoStage to stage reviewed files.

tools.name: git_snapshot
tools.description: Save a snapshot (git commit) of all changes in story, notes, and arc folders. Use after writing sessions or reviews.

tools.name: add_translation
tools.description: Add or update a cross-language glossary entry in .bindery/translations.json for agent reference (source → target term). For dialect substitution rules use add_dialect.

tools.name: get_translation
tools.description: Look up cross-language glossary entries from .bindery/translations.json. List all entries for a language or do a forgiving word lookup. For dialect substitution rules use get_dialect.

tools.name: add_dialect
tools.description: Add or update a dialect substitution rule in .bindery/translations.json (e.g. US→UK spelling: color→colour). Applied automatically during export.

tools.name: get_dialect
tools.description: Look up dialect substitution rules from .bindery/translations.json. List all rules for a dialect or look up a specific word.

tools.name: add_language
tools.description: Add a new language to .bindery/settings.json and scaffold its story folder with stub files mirroring the default language structure.

tools.name: memory_list
tools.description: List all session memory files in .bindery/memories/ with their line counts.

tools.name: memory_append
tools.description: Append a dated session entry to a memory file in .bindery/memories/. Supply a short title and content; the tool stamps the date.

tools.name: memory_compact
tools.description: Overwrite a memory file with a compacted summary. The original is backed up to .bindery/memories/archive/ first.

tools.name: chapter_status_get
tools.description: Read the current chapter progress tracker from .bindery/chapter-status.json. Returns a grouped summary by status (done, in-progress, draft, planned, needs-review). Returns a clear empty-state message if nothing has been recorded yet.

tools.name: chapter_status_update
tools.description: Upsert chapter progress entries in .bindery/chapter-status.json. Send only the chapters that changed — existing entries not in the payload are preserved. Creates the file if it does not exist.
